questionHtml: Sketch the graph of y = x 4 − 6 x 3 − 2 x 2 + 58 x − 51 , stating clearly the coordinates of any maximum and minimum points and intersections with axes.
markschemeHtml:
shape       A1

x -axis intercepts at (−3, 0), (1, 0) and y -axis intercept at (0, −51)       A1A1

minimum points at (−1.62, −118) and (3.72, 19.7)       A1A1

maximum point at (2.40, 26.9)       A1

Note: Coordinates may be seen on the graph or elsewhere.

Note: Accept −3, 1 and −51 marked on the axes.

[6 marks]

meta.title: Sketch the graph of y = x 4 − 6 x 3 − 2 x 2 + 58 x − 51 , stating clearly the coordinates of any maximum and minimum points and intersections with axes.
